name: Telomerase Restoration Trial Retirement Sweep

scope.question: Do the two Telomerase Restoration retirement-candidate trials have posted registry results, indexed publications, or sponsor disclosures that should keep them out of retired no-results archive?

summary: Ran the final retirement sweep for the two structured-date Telomerase Restoration retirement candidates from the trial-watch audit: NCT02530255 and NCT04133649. ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 still shows NCT02530255 completed with actual completion in 2018 and hasResults=false, and NCT04133649 unknown status with estimated January 2021 completion and hasResults=false. PubMed exact-NCT searches returned no indexed result for either registry; PubMed Libella search returned no records; broader AAV/hTERT hits were older wrong-scope vector or oncology records rather than Libella aging trial results. ClinicalTrials.gov broad queries returned the same known Libella AAV-hTERT registries and the same cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry, all without posted results. Web and sponsor-result searches surfaced registry mirrors, database pages, and old launch/context items but no result-bearing primary disclosure. Both retirement candidates were moved from late_no_results to retired_no_results; no outlook, stage, momentum, confidence, activity item, candidate bundle, or coverage assessment update is warranted.

materiality_decision.rationale: The only public change is trial-watch presentation and archive maintenance. The external field state did not change, and no new evidence or activity item was found.

search_log.summary: Scoped report contained 8 registry-linked Telomerase Restoration studies, 2 retirement candidates, 7 late no-results records, 1 active watch record, and no stale registry checks.

search_log.query: Direct checks for NCT02530255 and NCT04133649
search_log.summary: NCT02530255 remains COMPLETED with actual primary completion on 2018-10-31, actual study completion on 2018-12-31, last update posted 2019-07-05, actual enrollment 48, and hasResults=false. NCT04133649 remains UNKNOWN with last-known RECRUITING status, estimated primary and study completion in January 2021, last update posted 2019-12-10, estimated enrollment 5, and hasResults=false.

The Libella query returned the same three known unknown-status Libella AAV-hTERT registries, all hasResults=false. The telomerase-activator cycloastragenol query returned NCT02530255, still completed with hasResults=false.

search_log.query: "NCT02530255"; "NCT04133649"; Libella[All Fields]; NCT/title/intervention/sponsor terms for cycloastragenol retinal amyloid and Libella AAV-hTERT
search_log.summary: Exact NCT searches for NCT02530255 and NCT04133649 returned no records. PubMed Libella search returned no records. The cycloastragenol retinal-amyloid result query returned no result-bearing publication for NCT02530255.

search_log.query: NCT02530255 results; NCT04133649 results; Libella AAV-hTERT aging trial results; Libella Gene Therapeutics AAV-hTERT results; site:libellagt.com NCT04133649
search_log.summary: Search surfaced ClinicalTrials.gov, registry mirrors, industry/database pages, review/context pages, and old launch/news items. No sponsor, registry, publication, or durable primary page disclosed results for either retirement candidate.

trial_watch_checks.summary: Final retirement sweep found the registry still completed with no posted results and no indexed or sponsor-disclosed result. The study was moved to retired_no_results archive.

Final retirement sweep found the registry still unknown status with no posted results and no indexed or sponsor-disclosed Libella AAV-hTERT aging result. The study was moved to retired_no_results archive.

excluded_sources.title: SmartPatients, ICH GCP, CenterWatch, and other NCT04133649 mirror pages
excluded_sources.reason: Mirror pages repeated registry metadata for the Libella AAV-hTERT aging trial and did not disclose results.

excluded_sources.reference: Industry/database pages for AAV-hTERT and Libella
excluded_sources.title: Pharmaceutical Technology and Synapse AAV-hTERT/Libella pages
excluded_sources.reason: The pages describe development status or database listings but do not provide primary trial results.

excluded_sources.reference: Old Libella launch and context articles
excluded_sources.title: ClinicalTrialsArena, BioSpace, Fight Aging, and related Libella launch/context articles
excluded_sources.reason: Older news/context pages explain the trial launch or concept but do not report outcomes.

excluded_sources.title: PMIDs 20815258, 20213096, 18851780, 18338833, and 15248024
excluded_sources.reason: The broad AAV/hTERT result set consisted of older vector, oncology, or non-Libella records rather than AAV-hTERT aging trial results.

notes: This pass applies the trial-watch pruning policy created earlier on 2026-06-15.
Retired no-results records remain in the data and can be reopened if future registry results, linked publications, or sponsor disclosures appear.
No coverage assessment update is needed because the June 10 coverage repair already represented these records as no-results registry limitations.
next_actions: Repair structured completion dates for the remaining late no-results Telomerase Restoration records whose dates are currently embedded in prose.
Continue ordinary surveillance for posted Libella AAV-hTERT, TA-65, telomerase-activator, or TERT mRNA results and long-term telomerase safety signals.
